text.title: Kubernetes Basics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Kubernetes Basics` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: namespace-and-labels
step.action: Pick namespace; set recommended labels on Deployment + Service.

step.name: container-shape
step.action: Set image (immutable tag), securityContext non-root, resources.requests.

step.name: probes
step.action: Add readiness + liveness; tune periodSeconds + initialDelaySeconds.

step.name: rbac-and-config
step.action: Create ServiceAccount, ConfigMap, Secret; wire envFrom.
